primitives.title: Disclosure
primitives.summary: A button that shows or hides an associated panel. The foundation primitive — Accordion, Collapsible, Tabs, and Dialog all build on it.

primitives.title: Accordion
primitives.summary: A vertically stacked set of collapsible items with a single-open or multi-open coordinator. Arrow-key navigation, ARIA region wiring, per-item disable.

primitives.title: Tabs
primitives.summary: A tablist with roving focus, automatic or manual activation, orientation-aware arrow keys, Home/End. Selected tab stays in tab order; the rest exit it.
